subject: WM-0026 review: changes_requested
body: High: Hauling pickup is not fail-closed. packages/sim-core/src/hauling-jobs.ts removes source quantity before validating the subsequent JobCore step; a failed pickup with invalid tick returns an error but leaves source quantity reduced, and later cancellation releases reservations without restoring the lost carried amount. This violates WM-0026 material conservation/cancel-after-pickup acceptance. Required checks otherwise pass.
